category_sources: source_facts.description: Server and user space API to deal with multimedia pipelines; official docs describe PipeWire as a low-level multimedia framework.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use the display name PipeWire; source_facts.homepage is https://pipewire.org.
docs_sources: Dedicated official documentation domain is docs.pipewire.org; source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/pipewire/pipewire; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies multimedia pipelines; source_facts.executables lists PipeWire command-line utilities; official docs describe audio/video graph processing.
